# server.server_v5 { #app.server.server_v5 }

`server.server_v5`



## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [server_v5](#app.server.server_v5.server_v5) | Main server logic for the Model V5 tab, managing reactive data flow  |
| [url_exists](#app.server.server_v5.url_exists) | Ensure url for the file exists in the data host server |

### server_v5 { #app.server.server_v5.server_v5 }

```python
server.server_v5.server_v5(input, output, session)
```

Main server logic for the Model V5 tab, managing reactive data flow 
and spatial visualization.

### url_exists { #app.server.server_v5.url_exists }

```python
server.server_v5.url_exists(url)
```

Ensure url for the file exists in the data host server
